creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating port x11/windowmaker (or fresh installation) fails:

===>>> Starting check for runtime dependencies
===>>> Gathering dependency list for x11-wm/libwraster from ports
===>>> Dependency check complete for x11-wm/libwraster

===>>> windowmaker-0.95.3 >> x11-wm/libwraster (1/1)

===>  Installing for libwraster-0.95.4
===>   Generating temporary packing list
Making install in .
test -z "/usr/local/bin" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/bin"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 get-wraster-flags '/usr/local/bin'
test -z "/usr/local/lib" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/lib"
 /bin/sh /usr/local/bin/libtool   --mode=install /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel   libwraster.la '/usr/local/lib'
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel .libs/libwraster.so.4 /usr/local/lib/libwraster.so.4
libtool: install: (cd /usr/local/lib && { ln -s -f libwraster.so.4 libwraster.so || { rm -f libwraster.so && ln -s libwraster.so.4 libwraster.so; }; })
libtool: install: (cd /usr/local/lib && { ln -s -f libwraster.so.4 libwraster.so || { rm -f libwraster.so && ln -s libwraster.so.4 libwraster.so; }; })
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel .libs/libwraster.lai /usr/local/lib/libwraster.la
libtool: install: /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel .libs/libwraster.a /usr/local/lib/libwraster.a
libtool: install: chmod 644 /usr/local/lib/libwraster.a
libtool: install: ranlib /usr/local/lib/libwraster.a
test -z "/usr/local/include" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/include"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 wraster.h '/usr/local/include'
test -z "/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 wrlib.pc '/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig'
(cd /usr/ports/x11-wm/libwraster/work/WindowMaker-0.95.4/doc  && install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 get-wraster-flags.1 /usr/local/man/man1)
===>   Compressing manual pages for libwraster-0.95.4
===>   Running ldconfig
/sbin/ldconfig -m /usr/local/lib
===>   Registering installation for libwraster-0.95.4 as automatic
Installing libwraster-0.95.4...pkg: libwraster-0.95.4 conflicts with windowmaker-0.95.3 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/man/man1/get-wraster-flags.1.gz
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 70

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-wm/libwraster.

===>>> Installation of libwraster-0.95.4 (x11-wm/libwraster) failed
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for x11-wm/libwraster failed
===>>> Aborting update

Terminated

===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> x11-wm/windowmaker x11-wm/libwraster
